name: Terlingua Tile Fire Circle
locationSummary: Slow craft add-on with kiln stories, field notes, and a sunset circle around Susan's process.
summary: Gather around Susan's kiln at sunset to shape clay, hear the stories behind each glaze, and take home something you made with your own hands.
description: This intimate evening experience brings small groups to Susan's outdoor studio as the desert cools. She walks you through her tile-making process, shares the Big Bend inspirations behind her color palette, and guides you in creating your own piece. Wine, conversation, and the smell of mesquite smoke included.
